definition:
A prophet living at the time of Divided Monarchy, first mentioned at 1Ki.22.8; 
 son of: Imlah (H3229)
Another name of mi.kha.ye.hu (מִיכָֽיְהוּ "Micaiah" H4321G) 
 § Michaiah = "who is like God"
 son of Imlah and a prophet of Samaria who predicted the defeat and death of king Ahab of Israel
